const messageData={content,channel:activeChannel.id};if(parentMessageId){messageData.parent_message=parentMessageId;}if(mentionedUserIds&&mentionedUserIds.length>0){messageData.mentioned_user_ids=mentionedUserIds;}// Only try to save to API if we've had a successful connection
